decisions.title_en: Anthropic warns AI may soon build its own successors, urges coordinated pause mechanism
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Anthropic published 'When AI builds itself' on 6-5 with striking internal data (>80% of merged code AI-written as of May 2026, engineers merge ~8x more code/day than 2024, autonomous task length doubling every 4 months to 12-16h) and a call for a verifiable cross-lab slowdown mechanism.

decisions.title_en: Obernolte & Trahan unveil 269-page bipartisan Great American AI Act discussion draft
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First comprehensive federal AI framework from Congress: 3-year preemption of state AI-development laws, mandates for >$500M-revenue frontier devs (safety frameworks, incident reporting, semi-annual third-party audits), codifies Commerce CAISI. Distinct from the 6-2 Trump EO.

decisions.title_en: Generalist AI raises $400M at $2B valuation for physical AGI, backed by Nvidia/Bezos/Fei-Fei Li
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. $400M led by Radical Ventures at $2B post; backers include NVIDIA NVentures, Bezos Expeditions, plus angels Fei-Fei Li, Naval Ravikant, Eric Yuan, Bin Lin. Building cross-embodiment robotics foundation models (GEN-1).

decisions.title_en: Amazon engineers testify against AI data centers amid 30k+ layoffs; Seattle council passes 1-year moratorium
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. AWS engineers (Amazon Employees for Climate Justice) testified at Seattle City Council against $200B AI capex while Amazon cut 30,000+ corporate jobs; council unanimously passed a one-year limit on new mega data centers. Novel labor-vs-capex angle distinct from prior bigtech-capex story.

decisions.title_en: Ideogram 4.0 ships as 9.3B open-weight image model with native 2K and JSON layout
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Ideogram's first downloadable foundation model: 9.3B diffusion transformer trained from scratch, native 2K, structured JSON prompting/bounding-box layout, #1 open-weight on DesignArena. Apache-2.0 inference code, non-commercial weights license.
event_date 2026-05-27 is 10 days old (>5 day limit).
